product_overview: Public website and showcase surface for Hieco, a TypeScript-first toolkit for Hedera. The app presents marketing content, an approved-project showcase, ecosystem documentation, and a deterministic browser QA harness for package-level behavior.
core_goals: Verify public marketing and discovery flows remain usable.
Validate showcase search, filtering, navigation, and missing-project handling without brittle dataset assumptions.
Expose deterministic package behavior via /testsprite-lab for high-confidence browser regression checks.
Avoid automated checks that depend on live wallet signing, external mirror nodes, or realtime socket servers.

features.name: Landing Page Discovery
features.description: Homepage that presents the Hieco value proposition, primary call-to-action, and framework demo tabs for quick exploration.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Load the homepage and see the hero heading -> See the supporting copy -> See the Start Building button -> Click the Start Building button -> Observe expected page response or CTA behavior
Navigate to / -> Inspect the demo tabs section -> Click a framework demo tab -> See framework-oriented demo content render
Navigate to / -> Network error prevents page load -> See a visible load error or retry affordance

features.name: Showcase Search And Filters
features.description: Searchable and filterable index of approved showcase projects with client-side and URL-driven state and a wallet-gated project submit entry.
user_flows: Navigate to /showcase -> See the search input and filter controls -> Type into the search box -> Observe the URL query string update -> See displayed results refresh to match the query
Navigate to /showcase -> Open the package filter popover -> Toggle a package checkbox -> See results update to reflect the package filter
Navigate to /showcase -> Open the use-case filter popover -> Toggle a use-case checkbox -> See results update to reflect the use-case filter
Navigate to /showcase -> Toggle the open-source switch -> See the results view update to match the toggle state
Navigate to /showcase -> Click the Submit Project button while no wallet session exists -> See the submit action visibly gated and wallet connection prompt displayed
Navigate to /showcase -> Type into the search box that yields no matching projects -> See a clear empty-state message indicating no results

features.name: Showcase Project Detail
features.description: Project detail page that renders project metadata, handles missing slugs, and surfaces owner-only edit/delete actions when a matching wallet session exists.
user_flows: Navigate to /showcase/nonexistent-slug -> Fetch fails to find a project -> See a not-found state with a Back to Showcase action
Navigate to /showcase/nonexistent-slug -> Click Back to Showcase -> Navigate to /showcase
Navigate to /showcase/valid-slug -> Fetch project data -> See project screenshot -> See project metadata -> See package badges -> See use-case badges
Navigate to /showcase/valid-slug -> No wallet session present -> Open actions menu (if visible) -> See edit and delete entries gated or not shown
Navigate to /showcase/valid-slug -> Wallet session matches project owner -> Open actions menu -> See Edit entry -> Click Edit -> See edit form or navigation to edit UI
Navigate to /showcase/valid-slug -> Click Delete without an authenticated wallet session -> See a wallet-challenge or authentication-required message

features.name: Ecosystem Content
features.description: Static educational page describing ecosystem layers, responsibilities, and external references with outbound links.
user_flows: Navigate to /ecosystem -> Load the ecosystem page -> See major explanatory sections visible
Navigate to /ecosystem -> Click an external reference link -> Observe outbound navigation target (new tab or external URL)
Navigate to /ecosystem -> Click an external reference link that points to an invalid target -> See an external navigation error or browser-level failure indication

features.name: Package QA Harness (TestSprite Lab)
features.description: Deterministic browser harness exposing meaningful public-package behavior for @hieco/wallet, @hieco/sdk, @hieco/utils, @hieco/mirror, and @hieco/realtime without making live network requests.
user_flows: Navigate to /testsprite-lab -> See wallet-state scenario controls -> Switch wallet-state scenario to enable WalletConnect -> See connectable wallets list update to show WalletConnect as enabled
Navigate to /testsprite-lab -> Switch wallet-state scenario to mark some wallets unavailable -> See unavailable wallets reflected in the UI
Navigate to /testsprite-lab -> See SDK scenario controls -> Select an SDK scenario for a retryable error -> Trigger the SDK call -> See error classification and retry UI behavior
Navigate to /testsprite-lab -> Edit the entity ID input -> Change the network selector -> See entity parsing and required network URL validation update deterministically
Navigate to /testsprite-lab -> Edit the mirror override URL -> Observe the derived client configuration reflect the override without making live requests
Navigate to /testsprite-lab -> Run the realtime pre-connect subscribe check -> Attempt to Subscribe before pool connection exists -> See the guard fail fast and present a clear error
Navigate to /testsprite-lab -> Set mirror override to an invalid URL -> See validation or configuration error reported in the harness

routes.description: Marketing landing page with hero content, primary call to action, and framework demo tabs.
Static ecosystem explainer page describing how Hieco, Hedera, Hiero, Mirror Nodes, and wallets fit together.
Showcase directory with search, package filters, use-case filters, open-source toggle, and wallet-gated project submission entry.
Project detail page with not-found handling and owner-only edit or delete actions when a wallet session matches the project owner.
Deterministic QA harness exposing meaningful package behavior from @hieco/wallet, @hieco/sdk, @hieco/utils, @hieco/mirror, and @hieco/realtime.

features.name: Landing Page Discovery
features.description: Presents the core Hieco value proposition and lets users start exploring the product surface from the homepage.
user_interactions: Load the homepage and verify hero heading, supporting copy, and start-building button are visible.
Inspect the homepage demo tabs section and verify framework-oriented content is rendered.

features.name: Showcase Search And Filters
features.description: Lets users discover approved showcase projects through text search and multiple client-side or URL-driven filters.
user_interactions: Type into the search box to update the query string and refresh displayed results.
Open the package filter popover and toggle one or more package checkboxes.
Open the use-case filter popover and toggle one or more use-case checkboxes.
Toggle the open-source switch and verify the results view updates.
Verify the submit action is gated behind wallet connection when no session is present.

features.name: Showcase Project Detail
features.description: Displays a project detail view, handles missing slugs, and exposes owner-specific edit or delete actions when a matching wallet session exists.
user_interactions: Open a missing slug and verify the not-found state offers navigation back to the showcase index.
Open a valid project slug and verify screenshot, metadata, package badges, and use-case badges render.
If the signed-in wallet owns the project, open the actions menu and inspect edit or delete entry points.

features.name: Ecosystem Content
features.description: Provides a static educational page with external references explaining ecosystem layers and responsibilities.
user_interactions: Load the ecosystem page and verify the major explanatory sections are visible.
Open external reference links and confirm they are rendered as outbound navigation targets.

features.name: Package QA Harness
features.description: Gives TestSprite a stable browser surface for validating meaningful public-package behavior without adding Jest or Vitest tests.
user_interactions: Switch wallet-state scenarios and verify WalletConnect enablement, connectable wallets, and unavailable wallets change as expected.
Switch SDK scenarios and verify classification, retryability, and unwrap error behavior update deterministically.
Edit the entity ID input and network selector to validate entity parsing and required network URL behavior.
Edit the mirror override URL and confirm the derived client configuration reflects the override without making live requests.
Run the realtime pre-connect subscribe check and verify the guard fails fast before a pool connection exists.

known_limitations.issue: Showcase data is backed by live Convex queries, so exact result counts and available project slugs depend on current seed data.
known_limitations.impact: TestSprite should validate behavior and guardrails, not brittle fixed-content assertions tied to changing dataset contents.

known_limitations.issue: Wallet signing, authenticated project submission, project editing, and project deletion require a real connected wallet plus backend challenge flow.
known_limitations.impact: These flows should not be forced through unattended TestSprite runs without dedicated wallet and backend fixtures.

known_limitations.issue: External Mirror Node responses, realtime socket servers, and thin wrapper packages do not have stable deterministic browser fixtures in this repo.
known_limitations.impact: TestSprite coverage should focus on deterministic client-side behavior and integration boundaries exposed by the harness instead of live network effects.
